name: U.S. Energy Initiatives Corporation Inc.
summary: U.S. Energy Initiatives Corporation Inc., together with its subsidiaries, markets topical ointments, cannabis oils, tinctures, and vapor pens and accessories. The company was formerly known as Hybrid Fuel Systems, Inc. and changed its name to U.S. Energy Initiatives Corporation Inc. in June 2006. U.S. Energy Initiatives Corporation Inc. was founded in 1996 and is based in Santa Clarita, California.
